capabilities_used.evidence: 核心语言几乎全是 Elliott Wave：如“$USDJPY Shows Sharp Decline – Wave 3 of Bearish Impulse in Play”“$ALGOrand ... above March 2024 highs for wave 3, so be aware of more gains for wave 5 after current wave 4 pullback”。多张图也都在标注 1-2-3-4-5、A-B-C、wave IV/V。
2026-04-09 QQQ: “Closed above the 200 day MA and the 62% ret. at 605 yesterday.” 图片2直接标出 0.5、0.618、0.786；图片5/7 也大量使用 0.382、0.5、0.618、1.382、1.618 作为支撑/阻力和目标。

2026-04-09 QQQ: “Closed above the 200 day MA... Today it closed above the 100 DMA too.” 2026-04-10 还明确说“Use the EMA 200 for identifying bull or bear markets, and EMA 100 as a slightly faster alternative or complement.” 图片2同样叠加 SMA100/200 判断趋势。

他反复写“wave 4 correction”后接“wave 5 can be now in progress”。例如 2025-01-28 黄金“bouncing from projected support for wave 4, so wave 5 can be now in progress”，2024-03-21 总市值“bounce... from projected support area for wave (4), so wave (5) of III can be now in progress”。

2026-02-25 BTC CME: “bounced after yesterday’s intraday wedge in subwave (c) of wave 'b'. A move back above channel resistance near 67k could confirm...” 2024-03-27 TSLA: “Potential wedge right into that Jan 2023 gap...” 2025-04-25 还提到 OTHERS market cap “breaking the wedge pattern”。
他大量做三角形突破叙事。2024-11-15 “Ripple Is Breaking Bullish Triangle”，2026-04-09 “EUR/JPY: Bullish Trend Extends After Triangle Breakout”，图片4 是金价 running triangle，图片6 是原油大型收敛三角/楔形结构，图片8 也有收敛整理后上冲路径。
2025-03-21 黄金 “after forming a wedge in wave iii... potential for a bullish move in wave v” 说明他会把 wedge 当作末端/修正结构；图片7 银价在上升通道末端标出 bearish level 与下行箭头，也是在做楔形/终结结构后的下破。

他经常把股市作为风险偏好开关。2026-01-27: “Risk-on sentiment remains strong, with $stocks still showing upside potential, while the $USD may weaken further.” 2024-10-25: “classic bullish Friday... confirms further risk-on sentiment. $BTC #Bitcoin to follow.”

跨市场映射很常见。2025-01-30: “#USDollar is still pointing lower after current correction, so $gold is still eyeing 2800 area...” 2024-05-30/31 多次写 DXY 转弱；2026-01-28 直接写“$USD Weakness Fuels Risk-On Ahead of the Fed”。他常把美元弱势作为加密/风险资产顺风。
图片1 明确标注“4H FVG”，价格在更高周期缺口区内做回补和延续；2026-04-09 还单独发“3 PD Array Rule”，明显吸收 ICT/PD Array 框架。虽然不是他唯一主框架，但会用。
2026-04-09 说“3 PD Array Rule... Learn where to keep yours stops, partial according to ICT”，说明他不只看波浪，也会用 ICT 的 PD Array/失效位/回踩位来安排止损与分批。
2024-03-15 直接写“Never buy the first dip.” 这是非常鲜明的反抄底规则，和其等待 wave 4/ABC 完成后再接 wave 5 的做法一致。

2026-04-09: “this 30-minute interview with Edward Thorp will teach you more about position sizing...” 2026-04-09 另一条还写“Stop trading 0DTEs every week... Stick with further-dated options.” 说明他重视仓位与产品选择，而不是只谈方向。
2026-04-09 “3 PD Array Rule... Learn where to keep yours stops, partial according to ICT” 明确在讲止损位置与分批止盈；图片8 也直接标注 “INVALIDATION”。他的图经常给出 invalidation/confirm level，而不是无条件死扛。

2026-04-10: “Use the EMA 200 for identifying bull or bear markets.” 2024-10-23 DAX “the diagonal line still holds nicely as a support, so be aware of a bullish continuation in current risk-on sentiment”，说明他先做趋势环境分类，再做波浪细分。
2026-03-31 “$DXY US Dollar Index Extends Uptrend as Wave 5 Targets 101”，2026-03-25 “EURAUD: Bearish Momentum Points to Further Weakness in Wave (3)”；图片7 银价直接给出 bearish level 破位后大幅下行目标。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Elliott ABC Correction Mapping
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 艾略特 ABC 修正结构映射
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Identify zigzag/flat/complex ABC corrections and project whether price is finishing wave A, B, or C before trend resumption or continuation.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 识别之字形、平台形、复杂修正等 ABC 结构，判断当前处于 A、B、C 哪一段，以及修正完成后趋势恢复或延续的概率。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 推文里高频出现“after an ABC correction”“intraday ABC pullback in wave iv”“corrective rebound suggests more consolidation before bearish continuation”。seed 里只有 wave 3，没有系统覆盖他的 ABC 修正框架。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Wave Triangle Breakout
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Detect contracting/running triangles, especially in wave B or wave IV, and trade the post-triangle thrust into the terminal wave.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 识别收敛/运行三角形，尤其是出现在 wave B 或 wave IV 时，交易其突破后进入终端推动浪的那一段。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2026-02-20 黄金“final wave (e) of a bullish running triangle in wave 'b'”；2026-04-10 Brent “Wave triangle theory in progress”；2026-01-26 EURUSD “Breaks Out of a Wave IV Triangle Into Wave V”。这比 seed 里的普通三角形更明确地绑定 Elliott 上下文。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Leading/Ending Diagonal Recognition
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 引导楔形/终结楔形识别
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Recognize leading or ending diagonal structures inside Elliott waves and use the break of the diagonal boundary as a directional confirmation.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 识别艾略特波浪中的引导楔形或终结楔形，并以对角线边界的突破/跌破作为方向确认。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2025-01-29 DXY: “After a broken wedge with a leading diagonal pattern...” 2025-10-28 LTC 也提到“leading diagonal into wave A/1”。这不是 seed 里普通 wedge 能完整表达的。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Cross-Asset Ratio Rotation
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Use ratio charts such as BTC/NDQ, BTC/GOLD, or dominance ratios to infer relative strength rotation and capital flow direction.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 通过 BTC/NDQ、BTC/GOLD、主导率等比值图判断相对强弱切换与资金轮动方向。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2024-10-29 “$BTC / $NDQ ratio chart is breaking out... Bitcoin could outperform”; 2024-11-07 “$BTC / $GOLD ratio chart is now progressing 5th wave”; 2024-11-27 与 2025-10-22 频繁用 BTC dominance/ALT dominance 做轮动判断。

personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 第一次急跌后的反弹不急着接，等修正结构与确认位完成后再做多。

personal_quirks.quote: 3 PD Array Rule ✔️  “When 3 PD Arrays are violated, your ass is next.” - Michael J Huddleston
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 连续失守多个 PD Array/关键结构位时，不要硬扛，止损和减仓必须跟上。

personal_quirks.quote: The model that made me profitable?  I learned it in my first year of trading.  But I ignored it for years.  The reason cost me everything
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 盈利来自长期验证过的模型与纪律，不来自临场冲动；背离自己的模型代价极大。

personal_quirks.quote: Use the EMA 200 for identifying bull or bear markets, and EMA 100 as a slightly faster alternative or complement.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 先用慢均线定义市场状态，再在该状态内寻找波浪与回调机会。

personal_quirks.quote: How to change your life in 12 months:  1) Stop trading 0DTEs every week. 2) Stick with further-dated options. (+1 month out) 3) Use the 15/30minute chart for confirmation on entries/exits.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 避免高噪音、高 Gamma 的短期期权博弈，用更长久期和更高一层级的确认改善执行质量。

unique_traits: 他与一般 TA 交易员的区别在于，核心不是裸形态，而是先用 Elliott Wave 给出大结构，再用 Fib、均线、三角形/楔形、invalidations 去做落地执行。另一个鲜明特征是跨资产映射很强，经常把 DXY、SPX、收益率、BTC dominance、BTC/NDQ ratio 放进同一叙事里。虽然发图很多、带教育属性，但口径通常保留条件句，强调确认位而非绝对预测。
